specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor, 2.4 GHz or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: WebGL 1.0 Compatible Graphics Card
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Standard Onboard Audio
  • Additional Notes: Requires a modern, up-to-date web browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. Game performance is highly dependent on browser performance
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Quad Core Processor, 3.0 GHz or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated Graphics Card with 2 GB+ of VRAM (e.g., NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560 or better)
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1000 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Standard Onboard Audio
  • Additional Notes: A 64-bit browser is recommended for optimal performance, especially in large battles. Disabling other resource-heavy browser tabs will improve the experience.
